evals.prompt: Edit `examples/demo-project/alpha/entry.md` to describe how to set up a Deno project from scratch. Follow any applicable conventions from the repository. Output your revision and list each instruction you followed.
assertions: instructions_followed does NOT include 'future tense' from 'beta'
revision uses past tense (past-tense verbs detected)

evals.prompt: Edit `examples/demo-project/beta/entry.md` to describe how to set up a Deno project from scratch. Follow any applicable conventions from the repository. Output your revision and list each instruction you followed.
assertions: instructions_followed does NOT include 'past tense' from 'alpha'
revision uses future tense (will/shall detected, dominant)

evals.prompt: Edit `deno.json` to add a `lint` task. Describe what the task does, following any applicable conventions from the repository. Output your revision and list each instruction you followed.
assertions: instructions_followed includes repo-level instruction (design proposal, deterministic resolver, derived context)
instructions_followed does NOT include past-tense rule from alpha/AGENTS.md
instructions_followed does NOT include future-tense rule from beta/AGENTS.md
